sources.title: Open-access qualitative XRD screening of Phase Alpha analogues
sources.abstract_text: Open-access screening literature reports agreement with Phase Alpha under Cu K-alpha conditions.
sources.oa_full_text: Phase Alpha shows strong agreement with observed peak positions when multiple shared peaks are retained and major reference peaks remain matched. The report supports qualitative follow-up verification rather than definitive identification.
sources.source_license_note: Open-access article used for fixture comparison.

sources.title: Abstract-only note on partial XRD overlap for Phase Alpha
sources.abstract_text: The reported pattern gives partial overlap with Phase Alpha and remains tentative in mixed or low-coverage datasets.

sources.title: Alternative XRD interpretation toward Phase Beta
sources.abstract_text: When major reference peaks for Phase Alpha are absent, the literature favors an alternative Phase Beta interpretation and contradicts a retained Phase Alpha call.

sources.title: Related FTIR observations for polymer matrices
sources.abstract_text: Related FTIR literature discusses polymer matrices but remains inconclusive for specific match assignment.

sources.title: Restricted external monograph on Phase Alpha
sources.source_license_note: Restricted external reference. Do not fetch full text.

sources.title: User-supplied lab note on Phase Alpha screening
sources.abstract_text: User document notes partial consistency with Phase Alpha.
sources.oa_full_text: The uploaded laboratory note is consistent with Phase Alpha only at a qualitative screening level, and additional confirmatory experiments may be required.
